channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Trump-backed Republican primary wins signal party strength but raise risks ahead of US midterm elections
item.description: Republican candidates backed by US President Donald Trump have performed strongly across recent primary contests in several states, reinforcing his continued influence over the party’s base. These vic...

item.title: India and Canada to hold free trade talks as Indian commerce minister visits Ottawa to meet Mark Carney
item.description: India and Canada are set to advance discussions on a proposed free trade agreement during an upcoming visit by India’s Commerce and Industry Minister, Piyush Goyal. The talks are scheduled to take pla...

item.title: Agusan del Sur prepares for historic debut as host of Palarong Pambansa
item.description: Agusan del Sur is set to mark a major milestone as it prepares to host the Palarong Pambansa for the very first time. The announcement highlights the province’s readiness and enthusiasm in welcoming t...

item.title: Tinubu Wins APC Presidential Primary in Gombe State With 450,517 Votes
item.description: President Bola Tinubu recorded a major victory during the All Progressives Congress (APC) presidential primary election held in Gombe State on Saturday, after polling a total of 450,517 votes across t...

item.title: Reform UK proposes removing income tax on overtime pay for eligible workers
item.description: Reform UK has proposed a policy to remove income tax on overtime earnings for workers who earn less than £75,000 and work more than a standard 40-hour week. The party describes the initiative as a “ha...

item.title: Delhi Gymkhana Club seeks talks with Centre after eviction notice to vacate Lutyens’ Delhi premises
item.description: The Delhi Gymkhana Club has approached the Union government seeking an urgent meeting after receiving an eviction notice directing it to vacate its 27.3-acre premises in Lutyens’ Delhi by June 5. The ...

item.title: Jane Wyman's Early Career: Photos from Her Time as a Warner Bros. Contract Player in the 1930s
item.description: Jane Wyman, born Sarah Jane Mayfield on January 5, 1917, was an accomplished American actress who enjoyed success in both film and television. She earned an Academy Award for Best Actress, multiple Go...

item.title: Canada and International Allies Urge Israel to Halt West Bank Settlement Expansion
item.description: Canada, along with several allied countries including Australia, France, Germany, Italy, the Netherlands, New Zealand, Norway, and the United Kingdom, has issued a joint statement condemning Israel's ...

item.title: Tinubu to be formally presented APC presidential ticket and party flag after primaries
item.description: President Bola Ahmed Tinubu is set to officially receive the Certificate of Return and the party flag of the All Progressives Congress (APC) following the conclusion of the party’s presidential primar...

item.title: Eva Longoria, Zoe Saldana and Penélope Cruz attend Cannes Film Festival closing ceremony in glamorous red carpet appearances
item.description: Eva Longoria was among a host of international stars who attended the closing ceremony of the 79th Cannes Film Festival, joining actresses Zoe Saldana and Penélope Cruz on the red carpet. Longoria att...

item.title: Keir Starmer calls for Champions League final to be shown free-to-air by TNT Sports
item.description: Keir Starmer has publicly called on TNT Sports to reconsider its decision to place the upcoming Champions League final between Arsenal and Paris Saint-Germain behind a paywall, urging the broadcaster ...

item.title: Kiefer Ravena Present at B.League Final Week 2026 Held in Manila
item.description: Kiefer Ravena, one of the prominent Filipino basketball players, was seen attending the B.League Final Week 2026 activities in Manila. The event, which showcases the best of Japanese professional bask...

item.title: Recent Developments in AI and Robotics Across Industry, Research, and Consumer Applications
item.description: This news collection highlights recent developments in artificial intelligence and robotics, showcasing how rapidly the field is advancing across industrial, research, and consumer domains. The covera...

item.title: Cockroach Janta Party founder alleges censorship, threats and social media restrictions after rapid online rise
item.description: Abhijeet Dipke, founder of the satirical youth-led outfit Cockroach Janta Party (CJP), has alleged censorship, account restrictions and threats after the organisation’s sudden popularity on social med...

item.title: APC to formally present certificate of return and party flag to Tinubu ahead of 2027 election
item.description: The All Progressives Congress (APC) has fixed Sunday as the date to formally present President Bola Ahmed Tinubu with his certificate of return and the party flag, confirming him as the APC presidenti...

item.title: Halifax police investigate disappearance of newborn baby as four individuals are questioned
item.description: Halifax Regional Police are investigating the disappearance of a newborn baby in Nova Scotia and have confirmed that four people are currently in custody for questioning. Authorities announced the inv...

item.title: Nigerian Policy Expert Urges African Leaders to Focus on Economic Development Instead of Language Rivalry
item.description: Katika makala hii ya maoni iliyochapishwa na The Chanzo, Taiwo Akerele anamwandikia barua ya wazi Rais wa Kenya, William Ruto, kufuatia kauli yake iliyosambaa mtandaoni kuhusu Wakenya kuzungumza Kiing...

item.title: Ebola outbreak spreads in East Africa, WHO warns of wider regional risk
item.description: The World Health Organization (WHO) has declared the ongoing Ebola outbreak in parts of East Africa as an international health emergency, as new cases and deaths continue to emerge in Uganda and the D...

item.title: Google AI Search Briefly Misinterpreted Queries Containing the Word 'Disregard'
item.description: A reported issue with Google's AI-powered search experience caused unusual behavior when users searched for the word 'disregard'. According to TechCrunch and discussions highlighted on Slashdot, Googl...

item.title: KZN parents deny abuse claims after death of 12-year-old boy as social workers investigate
item.description: The parents of 12-year-old Shivan Cumberlege have denied allegations of abuse and neglect following the boy’s death at his home in Riet River, KwaZulu-Natal. Shivan, a Grade 3 learner at Parkgate Prim...
